bead.title: test: cite existing UI and SDK story coverage
bead.description:
Context: FEAT-031 UI STPs and CONTRACT-009 SDK tests have existing coverage but incomplete canonical citations. Add `@covers US-...-AC...` evidence where tests already assert the behavior, and keep story-level coverage intact.

In-scope files: `ui/tests/e2e/*.spec.ts`, `sdk/typescript/test/*.test.ts`, and the affected STP markdown rows under `docs/helix/03-test/test-plans/`.
Out-of-scope: adding new UI flows or SDK methods; missing behavior remains separate work.
Implementation hint: preserve existing `@US-113` style story tags if the UI story scanner needs them, but add canonical `@covers US-113-AC1` style evidence for TP-001.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cd ui && bun run check:story-coverage` passes.
2. `cd ui && bun test src/` passes.
3. `cd sdk/typescript && npm test -- --run` passes.
4. The executable @covers scanner reports canonical UI/SDK citations for each STP row moved from UNCITED_COVERAGE to COVERED.
